## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📄 Documentation update
- [ ] 🔧 Chore (refactoring, dependency updates, CI changes)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the existing style (Biome passes)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have added or updated tests that prove my fix/feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] Type checks pass (`pnpm typecheck`)
- [ ] I have updated documentation where relevant
- [ ] Docker builds pass locally (if applicable)
